monitors.name: AGENT-02: Queue Depth Exceeded Threshold
monitors.message: {{#is_alert}}@pagerduty-agent-02-oncall CRITICAL: Agent task queue depth is currently {{value}}. This exceeds the SLA threshold of 500. Immediate scaling scaling assessment required.{{/is_alert}}

monitors.name: AGENT-02: API High Error Rate Alert
monitors.message: {{#is_alert}}@pagerduty-agent-02-oncall CRITICAL: Agent execution error rate is currently {{value}}% (threshold is 5%). Check logs for API rate-limiting or service disruptions immediately.{{/is_alert}}

monitors.name: AGENT-02: P95 Execution Latency SLA Breach
monitors.message: {{#is_alert}}@pagerduty-agent-02-oncall WARNING: Agent P95 latency is currently {{value}}s, which exceeds the SLA limit of 30 seconds. System queries might be degraded.{{/is_alert}}
